title: microlicia decipiens
intro: Microlicia decipiens, also known as the False Balsam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can help treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Microlicia decipiens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Microlicia decipiens can be made into infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
